partnerSection1.description: We collaborate with the best-in-class technology providers, consultants, and logistics experts to deliver comprehensive solutions to our customers.

featured.name: Microsoft
featured.description: As a Microsoft Gold Partner, we deliver integrated solutions that leverage Azure cloud infrastructure and AI capabilities to power next-generation inventory management.

partners.name: Microsoft
partners.description: Cloud infrastructure and AI capabilities for scalable inventory management.

partners.name: AWS
partners.description: Secure and reliable cloud hosting with global reach.

partners.name: Salesforce
partners.description: Seamless CRM integration for customer-centric supply chains.

partners.name: Shopify
partners.description: Native integration for e-commerce inventory synchronization.

partners.name: DHL
partners.description: Global shipping and tracking integration for end-to-end visibility.

partners.description: Enterprise database integration for large-scale deployments.

cta.title: Become a Partner
cta.description: Join our partner ecosystem and help businesses transform their supply chain operations.
cta.note: No minimum requirements. All partnership levels welcome.

items.author: John Smith, CTO
items.quote: Working with Sazzad has been transformative for our business. Their platform and support team are exceptional.

items.author: Maria Garcia, VP Operations
items.quote: The integration was seamless and our customers love the real-time tracking capabilities.

items.author: David Lee, Product Manager
items.quote: Sazzad's API is well-documented and their developer support is top-notch.

testimonial.author: John Smith, CTO
testimonial.quote: Working with Sazzad has been transformative for our business. Their platform and support team are exceptional, and the partner program provides us with the resources we need to succeed.
